definitions: A Filipino-American social psychologist and assistant professor at the University of Massachusetts Amherst.
Known for her research on social cognition, intergroup relations, and the psychology of social class.
examples: Joan Ongchoco presented her latest findings at the conference.
The work of Joan Ongchoco has significantly contributed to the field of social psychology.
